Nx also stands as the ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/vsavkin/large-monorepo","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"fastest JS monorepo tool","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," available, demonstrating that adopting TypeScript does not necessarily compromise speed. However, we don't stop here. To push the boundaries further, we started to rewrite the most performance critical and computationally intensive parts of the Nx core in Rust."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Our initial focus was on ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/blog/nx-15-8-rust-hasher-nx-console-for-intellij-deno-node-and-storybook","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"rewriting the task hasher","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", previously reliant on Git with a Node fallback. This shift to Rust brings a noticeable performance boost, particularly in large repositories, while maintaining the same user experience."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Following this, we revamped the TypeScript dependency resolution, observing an almost 5x speed increase with our Rust-based approach over the traditional TSC method."}],[["$","blockquote",null,{"className":"twitter-tweet border-0","data-conversation":"none","data-theme":"light","data-lang":"en","data-dnt":"true","children":["$","a",null,{"href":"https://twitter.com/juristr/status/1726977598218199302","children":"Loading tweet..."}]}],["$","$L8",null,{"async":true,"src":"https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js","charSet":"utf-8"}]],["$","p",null,{"children":["Such enhancements are especially crucial for the efficient ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/features/explore-graph","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"project graph calculation","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". As we continue to evolve Nx, Rust will play a key role in optimizing performance-critical components. This strategic use of Rust complements our ongoing commitment to TypeScript, ensuring Nx remains as extensible and powerful as ever."]}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"first-class-vite-support","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["First Class Vite Support",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#first-class-vite-support","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Vite is rapidly transforming the landscape of frontend development! Its refreshing simplicity and innovative approach have made a significant mark in the developer community. What truly stands out is not just Vite's technological aspect but also how its team approaches and grows the community around the tool. Vite stands for speed and community, values that deeply resonate with us here at Nx."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Our collaboration with our friends in the Vite core team has been incredibly fruitful. Vite is not just compatible but a first-class option with many of Nx's frontend plugins. When you create a new Nx powered React workspace, Vite (and ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://vitest.dev/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Vitest","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],") are your default options."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2023-12-28/bodyimg1.webp","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["We also built some powerful code generators that not only facilitate a seamless ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/nx-api/vite/generators/configuration#nxviteconfiguration","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"transition from Webpack to Vite","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," but also pave the way for an effortless ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/recipes/adopting-nx/adding-to-existing-project","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"migration from a CRA-based setup","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," to a modern Nx + Vite based workspace. To see this process in action, ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zvYb7XCLQzU","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"check out this short video","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://analogjs.org/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"AnalogJS","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," — the fullstack Angular meta-framework which also heavily builds on top of Vite — is using the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nx/vite"}]," plugin to power its Angular and Nx based workspaces."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["We also spoke at both editions of ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://viteconf.org/23/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"ViteConf","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". If you're curious check out ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?si=A5Nkg3rxe3DlODc4&v=TiU-hdn7_To&feature=youtu.be","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Juri's talk about High Speed Monorepos","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," and this year's talk by ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?si=A5Nkg3rxe3DlODc4&v=TiU-hdn7_To&feature=youtu.be","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Katerina on Streamlining your Vite dev flow with Nx","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"nxt-level-publishing","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Nx't Level Publishing",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#nxt-level-publishing","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Open source libraries and frameworks share a common necessity: the need to develop multiple packages cohesively and efficiently while managing their versioning and publishing to NPM. Nx has emerged as a go-to choice for handling such open source monorepos (as we'll explore further in the next section of this blog post). Until recently, one area Nx did not address directly was versioning and release management. Traditionally, this gap has been filled with tools like ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/release-it/release-it","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"release-it","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/changesets/changesets","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"changesets","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", or custom Node scripts, similar to our approach in the Nx repository."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["However, many in our community have expressed a desire for a more native, integrated experience for versioning and publishing, akin to what Lerna offers. In response to this feedback, we've introduced ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/features/manage-releases","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"the \"nx release\" command","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", a solution designed to seamlessly integrate these processes into the Nx workflow."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"James Henry gave a deep dive talk of an early version of it at this year's Nx Conf:"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center","children":[" ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/p5qW5-2nKqI","title":"$undefined","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; fullscreen","loading":"lazy","credentialless":"true","className":"rounded-lg shadow-lg"}],"$undefined"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Since its introduction, the \"nx release\" feature has significantly evolved, leveraging the power of the Nx project graph to effectively understand inter-package dependencies. This understanding is crucial as it allows for:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"Versioning packages offering support for both independent and \"locked\" versioning strategies."}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Releasing packages in the correct sequence, ensuring dependency integrity."}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Beyond these core functionalities, the feature also includes a robust grouping mechanism, supports semantic versioning, and changelog generation. Additionally, it provides various release targets, such as GitHub and NPM. For those having special requirements, the ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/features/manage-releases#using-the-programmatic-api-for-nx-release","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"programmatic API","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," offers maximum flexibility."]}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"improved-node-backend-development-fastify-and-docker","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Improved Node Backend Development: Fastify and Docker",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#improved-node-backend-development-fastify-and-docker","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Colocating frontend and backend code within the same monorepo has become a popular practice. It greatly facilitates cross-functional teams and helps ensure end-to-end type safety. Although you can use ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.nx-dotnet.com/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"other backend stacks","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," with Nx, Node is a popular backend companion for JS based frontends. We had support for ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://expressjs.com/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Express","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," and ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://nestjs.com/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"NestJS","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," backend for a while."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["This year we added another popular option: ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://fastify.dev/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Fastify","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". Known for its high performance, excellent developer experience, and useful built-in features like logging, Fastify aligns well with Nx's modular software design principles. Its extensible and modular nature complements the Nx philosophy perfectly."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center","children":[" ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/LHLW0b4fr2w","title":"$undefined","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; fullscreen","loading":"lazy","credentialless":"true","className":"rounded-lg shadow-lg"}],"$undefined"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["In tandem with Fastify, we've also introduced ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://youtu.be/LHLW0b4fr2w?feature=shared","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Docker support","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," for Node deployments."]}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"nx-console-support-for-intellij","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Nx Console support for IntelliJ",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#nx-console-support-for-intellij","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Nx Console has evolved from an experimental side project of the Nx team to a core part for enhancing your productivity when working in a monorepo. In addition to publishing an official ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nx/playwright","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"@nx/playwright package","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", running the command to create a new workspace will now prompt for Playwright as an option for React, Angular, and Vue stacks:"]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"$$ npx create-nx-workspace@latest\n> NX   Let's create a new workspace [/getting-started/intro]\n✔ Which stack do you want to use? · react\n✔ What framework would you like to use? · none\n✔ Integrated monorepo, or standalone project? · integrated\n✔ Which bundler would you like to use? · vite\n? It has become the prevalent way of writing modern JavaScript applications. And we kept improving our support to streamline development and polish some of the rough edges. Like properly defining secondary package entry points. You can define them in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"package.json"}],", but both creating these entries but especially maintaining them can be quite painful."]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"{\n  \"exports\": {\n    \"./package.json\": \"./package.json\",\n    \".\": \"./src/index.js\",\n    \"./foo\": \"./src/foo.js\",\n    \"./bar\": \"./src/bar.js\"\n  }\n}\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["So in ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/blog/nx-16-8-release","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"v16.8","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," we added the ability to automatically have these generated for you by defining the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"additionalEntryPoints"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"generateExportsField"}]," when using the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nx/js"}]," plugin."]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"// packages/my-awesome-lib/project.json\n{\n  \"name\": \"my-awesome-lib\",\n  \"targets\": {\n    \"build\": {\n      \"executor\": \"@nx/js:tsc\",\n      ...\n      \"options\": {\n        \"main\": \"packages/my-awesome-lib/src/index.ts\",\n        ...\n        \"additionalEntryPoints\": [\"packages/my-awesome-lib/src/foo.ts\"],\n        \"generateExportsField\": true\n      },\n    },\n    ...\n  }\n}\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Similarly we improved the ability to package your TS libraries in multiple formats (ESM and CJS). When using the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nx/rollup"}]," plugin, all you need to do is define the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"format"}]," property in your config:"]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"// packages/my-awesome-lib/project.json\n{\n  \"name\": \"my-awesome-lib\",\n  \"targets\": {\n    \"build\": {\n      \"executor\": \"@nx/rollup:rollup\",\n      ...\n      \"options\": {\n        \"main\": \"packages/my-awesome-lib/src/index.ts\",\n        ...\n        \"format\": [\"esm\", \"cjs\"],\n        \"additionalEntryPoints\": [\"packages/my-awesome-lib/src/foo.ts\"],\n        \"generateExportsField\": true\n      },\n    },\n    ...\n  }\n}\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Here's a video that walks you through:"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center","children":[" ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/Vy4d0-SF5cY","title":"$undefined","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; fullscreen","loading":"lazy","credentialless":"true","className":"rounded-lg shadow-lg"}],"$undefined"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["But we wouldn't be talking about Nx if we didn't also look into speeding up TypeScript compilation for large monorepos. We called it \"",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/showcase/benchmarks/tsc-batch-mode","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"batch mode","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"\". When enabling batch mode, Nx leverages the underlying ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/features/explore-graph","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"project graph","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," to generate TypeScript project references behind the scenes for you, to fully leverage TS incremental building. The results are amazing. According to ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/nrwl/large-ts-monorepo","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"our benchmarks","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", batch mode has the potential to speed up Typescript compilation by up to 5x for large monorepos."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2023-12-28/bodyimg3.gif","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"nx-team-maintained-vue-plugin","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Nx team maintained Vue plugin",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#nx-team-maintained-vue-plugin","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 Federation",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#module-federation","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 Federation","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," is an exciting new feature of Webpack 5 that has gained a significant amount of interest in 2023."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Simply put, Module Federation allows a Javascript application running in a browser to dynamically load code from another application hosted at a different url, while facilitating optimal loading of shared dependencies."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"This is an exciting development as it allows a paradigm shift in how you can architect, build, and deploy Javascript applications! And this is especially exciting for monorepo fans, as Nx has best-in-class support for module federation that makes a Module Federation approach easy to adopt and simple to understand!"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Currently, our ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nx/angular"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nx/react"}]," plugins both have generators to ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/recipes/module-federation/create-a-host","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"create a \"host\" application","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," that will load and consume federated modules from ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/recipes/module-federation/create-a-remote","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"\"remote\" applications","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", which you can also generate using Nx. Then, by running a simple command with Nx, you can serve all applications required for your host application with the command:"]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"nx serve host-application --devRemotes=remote-application\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Where in the example above your host application is named \"host-application\" and a remote application that you want live updates on as you're developing is named \"remote-application\"."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Throughout 2023, we've continued to increase Nx's support and general dev experience around Module Federation, including ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/recipes/module-federation/federate-a-module","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"adding a generator to federate an existing module","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", improving the local developer experience by improving local webserver performance, and introducing the concept of ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/recipes/angular/dynamic-module-federation-with-angular#advanced-angular-micro-frontends-with-dynamic-module-federation","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Dynamic Module Federation","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," which will allow you to dynamically specify the location of your remote applications via a \"module-federation.manifest.json\" file!"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["At Nx, we're excited about the Module Federation ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx"}]," package (or initializing with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx init"}]," in any project or monorepo), you already get some cool features:"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"Advanced task scheduling, including task pipelines and parallel execution."}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Efficient caching mechanisms."}]]}],["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you want to learn more about such setup, make sure to check out our blog post on year:"}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://tanstack.com/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Tanstack"}],"target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NvPXK6DVZGE","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Zack talked about this collab with Dominik","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", and we also had ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://twitter.com/TkDodo","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Dominik","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," on our ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.youtube.com/live/IbU6b6s0H1Q?si=0QZexPwulLXB9FIN","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx live stream","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". Now, all the above-mentioned Tanstack libs have adopted Nx, and there's more coming."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-javascript/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sentry JavaScript"}],"target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," — Sentry, renowned for its comprehensive solutions in frontend monitoring and error logging, recently adopted Nx for their ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-javascript/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"official JavaScript SDK","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". This move integrates Nx's capabilities into their monorepo, containing packages for popular frontend and Node.js backend integrations. They also published a blog post on ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://sentry.engineering/blog/reduce-ci-time-with-nx-caching","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"the benefits they've seen following the adoption of Nx in their monorepo","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," (hint: reducing CI times by 35%)."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/ReactiveX/rxjs","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"RxJS"}],"target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," — The library for reactive programming in JavaScript. It is widely popular, with over 40 million downloads/week on NPM. RxJS only recently adopted Nx, not only leveraging speed improvements via caching, but also leveraging Nx's latest ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx release"}]," feature to publish packages to NPM."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://analogjs.org/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"AnalogJS"}],"target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," — Analog is a full-stack Angular meta-framework that brings exciting features to Angular, like faster Vite setup, support for both server-side and static rendering, and easy file-based routing. Analog uses an Nx monorepo for its development and also uses ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/extending-nx/intro/getting-started","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx's DevKit","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," to create tools that work great in both Nx and Angular CLI workspaces."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/qwikifiers/qwik-nx","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Qwikifier"}],"target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," — The Qwikifiers community built a dedicated Nx plugin to combine the power of Qwik and Nx. Their repo is a great example of building Nx plugins and ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/extending-nx/recipes/create-install-package","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"using Nx to build your own CLI","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/BuilderIO/mitosis","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Builder.io Mitosis"}],"target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," — ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.builder.io/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"BuilderIO","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," has an ambitious compiler project that allows you to write a component once and then compile it to different frameworks. Check out their ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://mitosis.builder.io/?outputTab=G4VwpkA%3D","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"mind-blowing demo page","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". They adopted Nx to ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/concepts/task-pipeline-configuration","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"coordinate task dependencies","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," and speed up their CI builds."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Ghost"}],"target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," — Are you into blogging? You might want to look at ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://ghost.org/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Ghost","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". They were using Lerna in the past and migrated to a fully Nx-powered workspace."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["And these are just some of them that joined in 2023. was about preparing for what we are planning to ship in Q1 2024."}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"solving-ci","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Solving CI",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#solving-ci","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 bottleneck if you use a powerful build system like Nx. Big tech companies know it and that's why their CI systems look nothing like Circle or Jenkins. We've been narrowing this gap over the years, but only this year we finally built a turn-key CI solution that gives you great performance, scalability, dev ergonomics, and must better cost efficiency."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"It has three components:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ci/features/remote-cache","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Nx Cach"}],"target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],": Built-in local and remote caching to speed up your tasks and save you time and money. Available now."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ci/features/distribute-task-execution","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Nx Agents"}],"target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],": A single line to enable distributed computation, across multiple machines. Fully managed agents, dynamically allocated based on PR size. Available early Feb."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Nx Workflows"}],": Next generation, fully managed CI solution with distribution at its core, designed from the ground up for monorepos. ",["$","em",null,{"children":"Available later in 2024."}]]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Optimal parallelization and distribution, using the right numbers of agents for each PR, rerunning flaky tests, splitting and distributing large test suites, handling dependencies between tasks across machines — are just some of the things we can now handle automatically for you. Turn it on and enjoy the speed."}],["$","h3",null,{"id":"solving-the-simplicity-vs-power-dilemma","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Solving the Simplicity vs Power Dilemma",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#solving-the-simplicity-vs-power-dilemma","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Balancing simplicity and power is the trickiest part of the dev tools design. Simple onboarding for small projects or handling the biggest enterprise systems? Two years ago we solved this problem by giving you a choice between the package-based setup (a more powerful version of something like Turborepo) and the integrated setup (we manage your whole monorepo in the most optimal way). But now we believe we have a much better solution, where you have both, the simplicity of the former with the power of the latter. So you no longer have to choose."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"We took inspiration from VSCode. Any project you open in VSCode will work right away: it is simple, and you don't need to configure anything. If you install say a Playwright plugin, VSCode becomes aware of Playwright. It can run and debug your tests right in the editor. That's what the Nx experience is going to be like. Any project, any tool will work right away. But if you — for instance — install the Playwright plugin, Nx will become aware of Playwright and will be able to cache test runs in the most optimal way and distribute your e2e tests across machines for best efficiency. All the benefits with none of the costs."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"The whole team is excited about it as the new experience feels much more elegant."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["As always, we try very hard not to break folks, so all your current workspaces will keep working, and we will ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/features/automate-updating-dependencies","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"provide automatic migrations","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," to bring you to this new way of using Nx."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Exciting stuff! So keep an eye on our channels, and subscribe if you haven't already ;)"}],["$","hr",null,{}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"learn-more","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Learn more",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#learn-more","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242
